items.headline: Saints draft Arizona State receiver Jordyn Tyson, brother of Cavaliers' Jaylon Tyson
items.description: The New Orleans Saints select Arizona State WR Jordyn Tyson, brother of Cavs' Jaylon, with the No. 8 pick in the NFL draft.

items.headline: Nuggets rule Aaron Gordon out of Game 3 against the Timberwolves with tightness in his calf
items.description: Nuggets forward Aaron Gordon was ruled out of Game 3 at Minnesota because of tightness in his left calf muscle.

items.headline: Suns' Devin Booker fined $35K for criticizing game officials
items.description: Booker made his comments to the press following the Suns’ 120-107 loss to the Oklahoma City Thunder in Game 2.

items.headline: Austin Reaves is upgraded to questionable for Lakers in first-round Game 3 against Rockets
items.description: Austin Reaves has been upgraded to questionable for Game 3 of the Lakers’ first-round playoff series against the Rockets.

items.headline: Reports: Bucks to hire Taylor Jenkins as head coach
items.description: The Bucks are reportedly finalizing a deal with Taylor Jenkins to fill their vacant head-coaching position.

items.headline: Recap: Hawks, Raptors and Timberwolves earn crucial Game 3 wins
items.description: Check out the best of Thursday's 2026 NBA Playoffs action, featuring Knicks-Hawks, Cavs-Raptors and Nuggets-Timberwolves.

items.headline: The Athletic: Scottie Barnes & Evan Mobley are already stars. But can they take the next step?
items.description: Scottie Barnes and Evan Mobley, forever connected by the 2021 NBA draft, find themselves at a crossroads 5 years into their careers.

items.headline: 4 takeaways: Knicks-Hawks Game 3 thrills to final seconds, as CJ McCollum takes over again
items.description: Trade acquisitions Jonathan Kuminga and CJ McCollum spark the Hawks to a go-ahead Game 3 victory over the Knicks.

items.headline: AJ Dybantsa announces he is entering 2026 NBA Draft
items.description: BYU standout AJ Dybantsa, who led the nation in scoring, is one of the top prospects in the 2026 NBA Draft field.

items.headline: Victor Wembanyama traveling with team for Game 3, but his status remains uncertain
items.description: Victor Wembanyama must complete additional steps in the NBA's concussion protocol before being cleared for Game 3 in Portland.

items.headline: Derrick White wins 2025-26 NBA Sportsmanship Award
items.description: In winning the 2025-26 award, Derrick White becomes the second straight Celtics player to garner those honors.

items.headline: 3 things to watch in Knicks-Hawks Game 3
items.description: The play of each team's reserves and Karl-Anthony Towns' play in the post could shape the outcome of Game 3.

items.headline: NBA Mailbag: Which first-round series is the best matchup?
items.description: 20-year NBA veteran Jamal Crawford answers your questions on 1st-round matchups, Jayson Tatum, Scoot Henderson and more.

items.headline: 3 things to watch in Timberwolves-Nuggets Game 3
items.description: Denver's defense, Nikola Jokić’s slow starts and the health of both teams are crucial as the Nuggets and Wolves meet for Game 3.

items.headline: 3 things to watch in Cavaliers-Raptors Game 3
items.description: Evan Mobley's assertiveness, Brandon Ingram's slump and the Raptors' reticence to shoot 3s are keys to watch in Game 3 and beyond.
